title: derris heterophylla
intro: Derris heterophylla, also known as the derris or tonkin wood, is a plant species that belongs to the pea family (Fabaceae) and is native to Southeast Asia. The plant is primarily valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a natural insecticide and its use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Derris heterophylla include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and other conditions. In herbal preparations, Derris heterophylla is often used to make extracts, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to treat a range of health issues.
